dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Cheers again for the Ambrosia, M. Not been much time for it though my professional associate and I managed to share a bottle recently. Short break, mind, but just what I needed!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Aphrodite's blessing on you, M? Impressive work, her graces are in very high demand! Much as she likes getting involved in personal affairs, yours surely is a special case!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Apollo's lighting up your life? Last thing he ever wants to do is get his hands dirty, but now, things being as they are, he doesn't have much of a choice I guess!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I know it was Apollo you expected, M, and he's quick! But I am quicker, and could beat him getting to you every time if I was a bit pettier than this! He'll be right with you soon.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Met Ares did you, M? Whenever there's a bloody dust-up, tempers flaring and all that, he will do everything he can to draw it out! This must be quite a big dilemma for him, mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Artemis and I weren't always close, each keeping to ourselves and all. But working with you and Hec brought us closer! We were so busy sneaking around, helped knowing we didn't have to sneak around each other!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You already caught up with Artemis, good good! She and I don't always chat, running around a lot, being discreet and all. But we exchange a knowing look from time to time!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Been good to see you and Artemis out and about a little more! She's got a mean bow but she can always use somebody out there drawing all the attention so she can line up her shots!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Athena's out there managing frontline defensive strategies and such. We mostly stay out of each other's way. She keeps her head in times like these, I'll give her that!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You run into a certain Underworld Boatman rowing about, you tell him I said hey? We've not collaborated much as before, what with everything of late. I miss those times!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: So the Boatman's been all right, has he? That's good! I know that he's been looking out for Hec and the rest of you for a while now, but do look out for him in turn, would you?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You sure are a good customer to my professional associate, or so I'm hearing, M! I'm mostly hearing hrrrrnggh, mind, but I've seen how many of his Gold Rewards you're racking up, and it is quite a lot!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: What a customer, the Titan of Time! I've not met Gramps before, though I can imagine what he must be like. Used to wonder how come my pop and his brothers were so dodgy sometimes. Now I know where they got it from!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You'd think the Titan of Time wouldn't be so stuck in the past, caught up in his idea of a Golden Age when he used to rule, and mortals hadn't a care in the world? Caring's not such a bad thing I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: No way you could have already stopped Gramps by now, but going after him right when you did, you're buying us some time to put a little wrinkle in his plan. So cheers!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Ran into Lady Circe on your way last night, did you, M? She's quite the talent with those magick spells of hers. Liked turning mortals to all sorts of things! Bit mean if you ask me!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I've got a lot of regulars, but just between us, this one is my favorite, M. You Underworld types tend not to be too fussy, and you're clear with what you want. I like that about you!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: For all that's happened, glad you finally met Demeter, even if only by Boon. She had a funny way of showing it sometimes but always loved your mum an awful lot. She'll fight to get her back, to the bitter end.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Some of our relatives don't like to get involved. Dionysus, he will go to every feast, but never to a fight! Why don't we all just get along, he says. Though, come to think... it's not a bad idea!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Some of the gods think Eris showed up near our mountain causing trouble again all because of you! They don't know I practically begged you to come up to our rescue over here. Think Hec gave you the order! We're really in it now...

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Wise move having an animal companion along! I've got a soft spot for the quiet self-sufficient types. My little tortoise Chellen always feels at home wherever we go!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: At least the family knows about you now! Always wanted to say, Message to Olympus! Persephone and Hades had another kid! And she's all right! But Hec knew we had to wait, and she knows a lot! So my lips were sealed.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: So Gramps somehow got hold of the Three Fates! That isn't good, not sure what we can do about it, M. At least now everybody on Olympus knows, I figured it was time! Got us a bit on edge, though we do hide it pretty well!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Still have the matter of the Three Fates to be sorted out. So Gramps just sent them into exile and then entirely lost track? How are we supposed to find them if he can't...?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Keeping track of your best time, that's what I like to see! Take anything worth doing, then do it just as well a little faster, and a little faster, and soon, you'll be like me! Almost!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Notice you're not timing yourself anymore, and M? It breaks my heart. Not really, mind. Just find your speed, but still! Want to know how fast you are, there's only one way to find out.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You found your father down there, M! Never could get close enough myself, hope he's still all right. Hope everyone's all right! We'll get them back, keep doing everything we can.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Known Hec a while, and don't envy either one of you. She couldn't just send you off to deal with Gramps before you were ready! You must have hated having to wait. I know I do!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You got Hephaestus to come out of his shell! All I can get from him are work orders, bring me more bronze and such! Glad you can put the fruits of all his labor to good use!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hephaestus makes a mean set of armor, and you know what? He makes a mean pair of sandals, too. I wear mine all the time! Footwear, M! I really think it's going to catch on!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You know, I think my stepmum likes you quite a bit! Not to be taken for granted! Despite her specialties, I get the feeling our Queen Hera's not too keen on kids.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Ran into big old Heracles, did you? My stepmum's sent him on another labor of some sort. Got the feeling that his heart's not in it anymore. But hey, he's tough! And we could use the help.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: So Hestia already got you, then? She's really rather spry despite her age. And likes to play with fire, too! Still just a kid at heart... one of those wee scary ones, mind!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You're moving right along there, M! Helps having that Metallic Droplet with you at all times. At least till it stops working for the night! Can't go top speed forever, but we try!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: What a coincidence, it's you, and you're already quick! But you can always be a little quicker! Not me, though.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Well you are moving awful quick, and sure enough, you've got that Droplet from me there! You must be real used to it, and it'll keep delivering night after night, you've got my guarantee!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I like to talk sometimes but I like going quickly always so how about we keep these little conversations nice and brief from here? For the most part!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hec always said you're quick to learn, you know? And sure enough, whenever I'd drop in, you'd be over a cauldron, working some new spell. Well, this is it! Your time to work some magick for our sake!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Officially, I'm keeping tabs on you, you're not supposed to know, just so you know. I tell Olympus all the latest happenings, nothing too private, mind; and then I tell you more! Just keeping tabs on everyone I guess!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: These last few nights since you got started, all I managed to confirm is Gramps got hold of someone whom he's sure gives him the upper hand. Right now he's readying the next stage of his plan to bring this mountain down! I'd better go.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Nice snake-staff that you've got there, M, must be they're all the rage! These snakes of mine are from Apollo, helps remind me of the family, you know? Stuck together, skin not so thick, pitch hissy-fits sometimes... love 'em anyway.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hec tells me Moros, son of Nyx, is staying with you for a bit down there? I thought he always stuck with the Three Fates. There's something going on, and I don't like it, M.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you made it to the finish line faster than ever last time! I may be keeping tabs, it's what I do, and maybe you won't always beat your best, but when it happens, it has got to feel good!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Guess what, last night, you made it to the end in record time, again! Keep getting faster like that and you'll soon be giving me a run for it, though I won't stand for that, you hear me, M?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You're taking something of a scenic route down to your father's House! Gramps has the major regions of the Underworld locked down, so... come to think, that makes a lot of sense!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You finally saw what it was like up here! Most of the others are holding out at the top of Olympus, and you are the reinforcements. So, come on back when you can, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Olympus has been under siege before! Normally, it's not too big a deal. But Gramps has something else in mind this time. Got some individuals here pretty spooked!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You saw we stashed some goods for you up on our mountaintop, right M? It's just a bit out of the way for my professional associate, though we'll keep you supplied!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Had a feeling that I'd find you here one of these nights, you know? Like something's in the air. I'm all keyed up, just want to get things done as mega-fast as possible!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Something's odd about tonight though can't exactly put my finger on it, M. Though Hec says that lately you've been messing with the Pitch-Black Stone of yours, which always made me feel a bit like this!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: To think I used to fill my days with whisking mortal newly-deads down to your father's realm! Honestly grew to like it soon enough, so even after Gramps showed up, I kept on stopping in when I could sneak a trip!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Your mum would travel back and forth between Olympus and your father's House, and I had the pleasure of accompanying her! One day, she didn't show up. I knew right then and there something was off...

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: That Cyclops waiting as you're heading out of town? Been there a while, thought eventually he would move on, but he did not! Gramps must have put him up to this...

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Uncle Poseidon's blessing done you any favors yet this eve? Likes claiming it'll make you nigh invincible, but here's a little traveler's insurance just in case!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: We've got more Titan problems than we figured, M. If Gramps could get Prometheus to take his side, who only knows what else. Ruffled a lot of feathers haven't we?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Prometheus and Heracles, turns out they're close, are they? Your little spat with them was shrouded by the dark but I caught glimpses of it here and there. I need to know about these things though doesn't mean I'll tell!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: M, I know it's not an easy trip, or even possible for you right now, heading all the way up here. But just imagine how hard it is for our family to swallow our pride and ask for aid! Things are that grim!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Time of need here, M, and we need you at the bottom of the Underworld, and the top of Olympus! Two places at once, my sympathies. The trick is to move really, really fast!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Oh good! Selene got a hold of you already, M! Quite the vantage point the Eye of Night has got! Always looking out for you and all of us. Her steeds are pretty quick as well!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: This is a proper spooky night, you had something to do with it, right M? My heart's racing nonstop! Whatever you've been up to in your Crossroads there, hope it works!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hec says you spoke the Oath of the Unseen, so then I guess we're in for it, right M? The others might not know what's going on, it's just another eerie night, but you do what you have to do. Night's will be done and all.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You've never been one to back down from anything, huh, M. Well then that Oath of the Unseen is everything you ever wanted probably! Why go easy, when you could go hard?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You made it up here, M! I'll speed you on except this climate's going to be rough. You Underworld types and surface air! Must be something we can do about it, right...?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey M! Don't know exactly what you did, or maybe Hec, but you seem much much more yourself than last I saw. That's great! Because to make it all this way, you're going to need every bit of strength. And speed!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey M! You're here! That's great! Hec says you even got your Underworld blood-curse sorted so you're ready for a bit of a long-distance run. Just watch for bumps along the way, though let's speed you past them if we can!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: The dead throughout Ephyra should be resting easy in your father's care, but Gramps shut it all down, flung open the Underworld's gates, and here we are. If I were dead, I'd be mad, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: All right, so it's rough going on the surface for you, I get that, but don't give up on us yet, M. I know you never would, mind. Probably just searching for some magickal ingredients you need, something like that?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You found my special Shrines, good good! Some mortals pray to me both for safe travels and free stuff. Almost free. Small surcharge, mind! Associate has got to take his cut.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Gramps sends forces to Olympus, we can send them whence they came, no sweat. But he's got something else in store, and whatever it is, it's big. Learn anything, let Hec know right away.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: If only I could whisk you clear across the sea-rift that Poseidon carved out. But we mustn't get spotted working too closely together. And besides, you're helping us with every deck you swab! So cheers!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Something that scares me, M, is the idea that Time may be even quicker than I am. Remember back when you were real small! Well bam! You're old now, just like that!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Time sure is strange, don't you think, M? No surprise not even Gramps entirely understands it himself. I just don't like it when Time drags on for too long, so let's move!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Good news is we can now be sure what Gramps had planned for us, but bad news is, it's Typhon, and he's big. But my pop stopped him once, so how hard could it be...?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Who do you think can make it to the top of Mount Olympus first, M, you or old Typhon? You've got a longer way to go, sure, but you are definitely faster! Or about to be!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Typhon is gone for good?! My pop, he can't believe it still, but there has been no sign of that monstrosity up here since you last took him on! But why am I surprised? I figured if anyone could pull something like that off, it would be you!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You almost made it to the very top that time, and though it's not my wish to spoil the surprise, you ought to know we're dealing now with good old Typhon, Father of All Monsters! Isn't that just great...? We need you back here, M.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hec says you're getting closer to a breakthrough there, with Gramps and Typhon and whatnot. Don't want to rush you, M, but this is me! I just can't help myself sometimes.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: All this reminds of the time I backed your brother when he was searching for your mum! Had a vested interest in the outcome, sure. But before I knew it, I really started to care! We'll find a way to help them, won't we, M?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Saw your brother's back and doing well, that's great! Always was a tough sort, I figured he'd pull through. Who knows, maybe some evening he'll get you out of a bind!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: One of these nights, maybe you could teach your brother how you breathe up here so he could pay us all a visit too? Eventually, I mean, after we're finished cleaning up for Gramps. The family always wanted Zag to stop on by.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Heard from my pop tonight already, M? He's always been a very busy god but never tires out. Now that you've got his lightning strength, how about some lightning speed to boot?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Both got some business to attend to, so let's get you on your way!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Thought I'd check up on you, everything good? Then good!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Things don't look great right now, but that can quickly change!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Sure, Time goes fast! But I think we'll be able to keep up!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Coincidentally was passing through with choice of blessings here!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Quick and quiet, M! You've got this, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: In a bit of a rush, here, M, so let's get moving shall we?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Special delivery for the Princess of the Underworld!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey M, you need a lift? 'Cause I've got one. Three, in fact!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I'm scraping by. You scraping by? Let's scrape on by, why not?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: They say to not be hasty, but then what do they know, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Live fast or not at all, right, M? Now take your pick!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: We'll have you on your way in no time at all!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Figured you were due to get there right about now!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Don't think too much about this now, just snap one up and go!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Looks like we've got another busy eve ahead of us!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hurry, M, before it's too late! I like saying that.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Got something here should put a real spring in your step!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: All right, M, let's give you a little boost!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Oh hey! Thought I'd stop by, drop off a little something for you here!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: We're in a race against Time, and so help me, we are going to win!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Nice night for a little jog, wouldn't you say there, M?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey! Got one of those special deliveries for you, M!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Only the best and swiftest service for my valued customers!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You headed up this way? Maybe I'll see you later on!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Want to make haste, then I got just the thing!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Lots going on! Been running around all night!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: No calamitous attack on our family is going to slow us down!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Got to check up on a couple of things, but first, here!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey hey, M! One of those heys is from Artemis.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey hey, M! One of those heys is from Selene.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Let's keep the pace up and get rid of every last bad possibility!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: It's been a busy night though I will always make the stop for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Think you can take out Typhon just like last time, M?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: However many Typhon possibilities are left, let's make one less!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Got another mean old Chronos to take care of so don't let me keep you, M!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Choose quickly M, or else! Or else I'll wait. But I would rather not!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Don't just want to be quick, be quick! Including when you choose!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Got something I think you can use, and a couple others just in case!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Now take a moment to decide here M, but don't take more than that!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: The busier we are, the more we do, and the faster the time goes by!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: New moon, which means Selene gets a break, but you know who does not?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: The sooner we get this done, the sooner we get to the next, and on, and on!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Don't keep me waiting, M, unless you want to kill me, in which case we can't be friends!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Used to always want you on the surface although lately I don't mind it either way!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Found you quick so you have got the whole rest of the night to hurry up!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Sure, the worst of our problems are over for now, but why slow down?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I'm glad you're here, Hermes, and it's an honor to finally be working together. To our swift victory!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hey! It's been a minute since I got an offering! Cheers, M, although you needn't have. But here, I've just the thing for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Hermes, if there's anyone out there who can help me outpace Time, it's you. Please accept this, for your swift and reliable service.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Right charitable of you, really, M, it's just I really need to move along, so let's get to the blessings if you please?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: If not for all your speed and bravery, we never would have had a fighting chance against our enemy, Hermes. I don't think we'll soon be able to repay you for this, but I can try!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Right cordial of you, M, though I'm not much for tips and we've got pressing matters to attend to, don't you think? Though I appreciate it, honestly.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I know you've been exceptionally busy as of late, though might I briefly interrupt our routine to give to you this little offering? It isn't much, but down here it's some of the best we've got.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Don't know how you can find the time these days, though I am grateful that you thought of me like this! Now straight to business, then? Got lots to do!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Where would we be without you, Lord Hermes? You've done so much to prepare us for the rigors we're having to endure. I know your efforts by their nature sometimes go unnoticed, but not by the Unseen.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: It's been a real pleasure working with you, M. One of the bright spots in all of this in fact! I keep my chin up no matter what, got to see where I'm going, right? Cheers for making it easy!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: To the swiftest of the gods, and one of my dearest, oldest comrades. Lord Hermes, you've served both Olympus and the Underworld, and you've seen it all. The rest of our family can learn so much from you. I know I could.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I run around a lot and all. Been to a lot of places, met a lot of different characters, but you know what? You're still the best, I really mean it, M. You're not the fastest, mind! Can't have it all. But you and me? We cut it pretty close.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Special delivery for you, Lord Hermes! You've aided me more times than I can count, and encouraged me every step of the way. I could never have come this far this quickly otherwise.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey! Ambrosia! Just what I always wanted! Not seen it very often recently, nor the feasting that tends to go with it. Though at this rate we might soon have more! Feasting that is, which ought to be in your honor.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: To our esteemed Messenger, and my distinguished friend! Not only have you kept the bond between the Underworld and Olympus from fraying, you've done it swiftly and silently. You're practically a chthonic god yourself!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: That really means a lot, cheers, M. You know I like doing things fast, but the one thing I like even more is doing things well. We gods don't always have to work hard, but your father always did, and so do you. I'm glad I'm not alone.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Somebody call for Premium Express delivery, hey, M? This is the best I've got, and it'll take you far and fast! You have my guarantee!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Fresh from the highest peaks of Olympus, it's the Premium Express! The finest, fastest blessings, for only the most discerning customers. That's you!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey, hear that, M? Why, that's the sound of Premium Express delivery! Always bringing you only the very best. So, make the most of it?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: This time I've got my very best for you to choose from, M, though you should always expect quality from me! I just have even more of it than usual right now!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You know, it's gotten harder sneaking down into the Underworld of late! Good thing I happen to know an expert on the subject. And so do you, I see!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Cheers for your business, on behalf of my erstwhile professional associate there! Feels good to be working together with that one again, you tell him I said hrrnnggh!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: The boatman always takes his toll, that's just the way it is! Though the benefits are more than worth the asking price, you got my guarantee!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: What do you guess my professional associate does with all that coin, really? He still won't say a word. Think he's just covering his tracks so Gramps can't pin him down!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: How long you think it's going to take to do away with all that Chronos Gold, another age or two? Not that you're slow, mind, more that he minted an awful lot of coins right quick!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Looks like you hit a few bumps on your way there, M! Do watch your step, though when you're moving fast, I know it can be tough!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: It's rough out there tonight, isn't it M? Well just hang on, and maybe one of these will help you go a little farther, faster!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Oh, no! You're hurt! What happened to you, M? Gramps must have got to you before I did! How is that even possible...?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: That's not the safest place to travel, is it, M? So you picked up a scrape or two, so what! Now you'll pick up some speed!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You found them, M! The Fates! They told me so themselves, figured I'd spread the word, being a messenger and all, and you know what? They're right! Sounds like their time away gave them a change of heart...

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: The Fates supposedly are no longer deciding what'll happen from here out? Except big stuff, like new ages and such? Don't know how we're supposed to tell the difference, whether everything is planned by them or ours to decide...

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Some sort of new age is in store then, take it you heard all about that firsthand, M. Guess it'll be here before we know it, as things like that tend to go! We'll be ready, and even if not, we'll act fast.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I'd say I can't believe you did it, M, but that would mean I didn't think you could, but I did, so I won't! But I will say: Cheers for everything! I know we might not be completely done, but if a bit of pressure's off now, good.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: So far I'm liking this new Gramps of ours much better than the mean old Chronos from before. You'll have to tell me sometime how you turned his world upside down to make him be this way. Hec hasn't said a thing!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Your father's back where he belongs, your mother too, I'm really glad they're safe and sound together, M. You've got to make up for lost time with them, and you'll be able to from here on out!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Hey M! Heard you were heading out again, figured I'd drop on in, and send you off! Safe travels, and all that!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Long way to go from there, right, M? Well let's see if we can't cut out a little travel time to your next destination!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Thought I'd catch you right on your way out! Travel can be a very rewarding experience, but sometimes, you just want to get to where you need to be!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Another race to the finish line begins, hey, M? Well then, get set, because we'll have you there in no time flat! Provided you survive and all...

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: M, I would never mean to slow you down, especially as you get started for the night! So you go on and pick something, and then get out of there!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Thought you could sneak on out of there without me giving you my Boon, well you're entirely mistaken, M! And you're about to be much quicker, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You showed old Gramps who's boss! Good going, M! That ought to trip him up a bit. Fine time to come on up and help us drive his forces off our turf. What do you say?

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: No surprise old Gramps is a tough customer, but sorry he got you last night. And cheers for heading up this way! Time isn't going anywhere just yet, but this mountain might!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Oh great, you're headed up this way and not gone too far yet! Think you could make good time on your way here, although the choice is yours!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I know you can't breathe in our surface air forever, M, so it's a good thing I got a hold of you right as you're starting off! We'll get you to this mountaintop in practically no time.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Message from Olympus, M! It says Cheers for all the backup lately, since we know you could be down in Tartarus fighting with Gramps instead. Athena's words, not mine!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You're really helping tip the scales here! Broke through the siege and gave our relatives a minute of reprieve. Still isn't over, mind, but we can get there soon enough I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: We really got him, M! Typhon, that is! I saw him tumble down the dark side of the mountain to the bottom and go boom! Then later saw him slowly get back up, and roar more angrily than ever, but hey!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: I wouldn't have believed you're going after the remains of Typhon had I not seen the whole thing for myself! Time works in strange ways! And looks like you can put a stop to it after all. Some of it!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Another night, another Typhon down, but there are plenty more where he came from, is that your understanding, M? Glad those Typhons haven't been a problem for us here!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: You made it pretty far down there before! Impressive work, I knew you had it in you, M! But Gramps still isn't backing down, is he? Maybe he's having second thoughts at least!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: That wasn't Gramps himself you dealt with last night, but some sort of fluke of possibility that happened all because of how you dealt with him in the first place? I've seen a lot of things, M, but this is a first!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Last night marks one more mean old Chronos down I guess! Sounds like we've got a lot of them to go through, though I'm sure we'll start taking care of them faster and faster!

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Had enough surface air for now, I get it, M. The more familiar path is often best! Either way, take this at your own pace. Don't anybody rush you! Except me.

dialogueLines.speaker: HermesUpgrade
dialogueLines.text: Message from Olympus, M! It says How come you're toiling about the Underworld? We sure could use you way up here, it's just we're way too proud to ask! But I am not too proud.
